userMessage: Set up search on B1 for CAN FD error frames

warnings: Detected over-concatenated SCPI command strings; split into grouped steps (max 3 per step).

response.text:
Built a verified flow and defaulted B1 to FDNONISO with a note to switch to FDISO if needed.

actionsJson.summary: Replace the empty workspace with a pyvisa flow that configures B1 for CAN FD and sets SEARCH1 to find CAN error frames on B1.
findings: The request did not specify ISO vs non-ISO CAN FD, so the flow defaults B1 to FDNONISO.
suggestedFixes: If your bus uses ISO CAN FD, change the bus standard step from FDNONISO to FDISO before running.
Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Long semicolon command chains were split and grouped for readability (max 3 commands per step).
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "scope1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: Search B1 CAN FD Error Frames
flow.description: Configures bus B1 for CAN FD and sets SEARCH1 to find CAN error frames on B1.

params.text: Defaulting B1 to FDNONISO for CAN FD. If your bus uses ISO CAN FD, change BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO to FDISO before running.

params.command: BUS:B1:TYPe CAN; BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO; DISplay:WAVEView1:BUS:B1:STATE ON

steps.label: Select SEARCH1 and set BUS search
